message:
fix(test): fix flaky proptest_hyperloglog and proptest_indexing failures

- proptest_hyperloglog: widen cardinality tolerance from 3 to 4 standard
  errors. With p=8 (256 registers) and ~100 distinct items, 3 SE gives
  only ±19.5 margin — insufficient across 256+ proptest cases.

- proptest_indexing: dedup test strategy could generate whitespace-only
  text (e.g. " ") which ingest_documents skips as empty, causing 0
  accepted instead of expected 1. Strategy now requires leading
  alphanumeric character.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
